title: macrolearia lyallii
intro: Macrolearia lyallii is a species of flowering plant in the family Oenotheraceae, commonly known as the New Zealand evening primrose. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid with anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Macrolearia lyallii include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and eczema. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as oil and capsules, are available, often used to support skin health and reduce inflammation.
